name: Neoteq
notes: Neoteq Ventures, early-stage VC firm based in Cologne, Germany. Multiple companies named Neoteq exist (India, Australia) but the VC entity best fits a CRM context.

name: MS&AD
notes: MS&AD Insurance Group Holdings, Inc., headquartered in Tokyo, Japan. Major Japanese insurance conglomerate (Mitsui Sumitomo + Aioi Nissay).

name: Axel Springer Ventures
notes: Axel Springer Digital Ventures (also known as Axel Springer Ventures), corporate VC arm of Axel Springer SE, headquartered in Berlin, Germany.

name: Cyan Banister
notes: Cyan Banister is an individual investor and General Partner at Long Journey Ventures, based in San Francisco, CA. Previously a Partner at Founders Fund.

name: Box
notes: Box, Inc. (NYSE: BOX), cloud content management and file sharing company headquartered in Redwood City, CA.

name: YC
notes: Y Combinator, leading startup accelerator. Moved from Mountain View to San Francisco (560 20th St, Dogpatch neighborhood) in early 2024.

name: Indicator Ventures
notes: Pre-seed and seed-stage VC firm headquartered at 373 Washington St, Boston, MA. Also has NYC presence.

name: Fifth Down Capital
notes: Fifth Down Capital, venture capital firm headquartered at 370 Grove Street, Needham, MA 02492.

name: Precursor
notes: Precursor Ventures, pre-seed and seed-stage VC firm headquartered at 170 Grant Ave Fl 4, San Francisco, CA.

name: Haystack
notes: Haystack (formerly Haystack Fund), early-stage VC firm headquartered at 727 Sansome St, Floor 3, San Francisco, CA.

name: Kimbal Musk
notes: Kimbal Musk is an individual — entrepreneur, restaurateur, and angel investor based in Boulder, CO. Co-founder of The Kitchen Restaurant Group and Big Green nonprofit. No personal website/domain applicable.

name: Jeremy Liew
notes: Jeremy Liew is an individual — Partner at Lightspeed Venture Partners (lsvp.com), based in Menlo Park, CA. Known for first investment in Snapchat.
